## Summary

Please describe the purpose of this pull request (e.g., `chore`, `fix`, `feat`).

## Testing

What steps were taken to verify this change?

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (e.g., `chore: ...`, `fix: ...`, `feat: ...`).
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] Code adheres to PHP CodeSniffer rules (`composer phpcs`).

---

### Conventional commit examples:
- `feat: add 2FA support to login form`
- `fix: avoid duplicate DB insert on page subscribe`
- `chore(release): configure release-please`
